name: Seasoned Orange Roughy
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Dry seasoned bread crumbs - finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a 9 x 13-inch pan, melt butter in the oven.
3. In a separate bowl, combine bread crumbs, grated Parmesan cheese, basil, oregano, salt, and garlic powder.
4. Dip each piece of fish in the melted butter, then coat with the breadcrumb mixture.
5. Arrange the coated fish in the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle with white wine and lemon juice.
7. Sprinkle mushrooms and almonds on top.
8. Bake covered for 25 minutes.
Everyone that tastes this dish loves it and it is so easy to prepare. Shared by Judi M. Phelps, jphelps@slip.net or jphelps@best.com.
